label_categories.description: Posts from restaurant/shop OWNERS about their own business (refer to ShopeeFood - Shipper, Merchant classification table - regularly updated) + classified ads
label_categories.rules: Content FROM restaurant/shop owners posting about their OWN business. Must show ownership perspective. NOT food reviews or customer recommendations.
examples: Quán mình kính chúc mọi người năm mới
Shop tôi đang có chương trình khuyến mãi
Cảm ơn khách hàng đã ủng hộ quán

label_categories.description: Posts from delivery drivers about their work experience (refer to ShopeeFood - Shipper, Merchant classification table - regularly updated)
label_categories.rules: Content FROM delivery drivers posting about their work. Must be from driver's perspective, not just mentioning delivery in passing.
examples: Hôm nay chạy được 30 đơn
App tài xế bị lỗi không nhận đơn được
Khách không nghe máy, giao hàng thất bại

label_categories.description: Posts from official ShopeeFood channels: News posts + brand marketing campaigns + official announcements
label_categories.rules: Content from official ShopeeFood brand channels, news media, or brand marketing campaigns. Includes official promotions, campaigns, and announcements.
examples: ShopeeFood ra mắt chương trình Siêu Tiệc 2.2
Tin tức: ShopeeFood mở rộng thị trường
Tổng Tài giao đồ ăn - chiến dịch marketing mới

label_categories.description: Fallback label for ShopeeFood when true label is unclear. This includes: food reviews, customer experiences, personal posts about food/restaurants. This label is not yet properly defined - use as default when classification is uncertain
label_categories.rules: Use for: 1) Food bloggers/reviewers posting restaurant reviews (even with detailed info, prices, addresses, links), 2) Customers sharing food experiences, 3) Personal posts about ordering/receiving food, 4) Any content that doesn't clearly fit Merchant/Shipper/Brand. Manual review recommended as this category lacks clear definition.
examples: Review quán ăn ngon ở Hà Nội
Hôm nay đặt đồ ăn qua ShopeeFood
Giới thiệu món ăn ngon với giá cả, địa chỉ

label_categories.description: Order creator - sender shipping through delivery service (shop owner, individual seller)
label_categories.rules: Person who creates orders and sends goods through delivery service. Topics include: order creation/cancellation, pickup, COD, shipping fees, reconciliation, refunds, contracts
examples: My shop created an order but no shipper has picked it up yet
When will the COD for this order be reconciled?
GHN hasn't come to pick up goods for the shop

label_categories.description: Customer who buys goods from online shops (buyer and receiver, not order creator)
label_categories.rules: Customer who receives goods from online shops. Topics include: not receiving goods, late/wrong delivery, cannot contact shipper, reschedule delivery, collection fees
examples: I am the receiver, haven't seen delivery for several days
Shipper called when I was busy, can they deliver again?
I didn't order this

label_categories.rules: Delivery/pickup personnel. Topics include: driver app errors, cannot contact customer, failed pickup, return notification, order status updates
examples: I am a GHN shipper, customer doesn't answer phone
Driver app has error, cannot receive orders
Shop is closed, cannot pick up goods

label_categories.description: Role not clearly identified or not directly related to orders
label_categories.rules: Unidentified role or content not directly related to order fulfillment

Content for drivers/delivery personnel. Topics include: benefits, salary, bonuses, driver app errors, customer contact issues, successful/failed pickups, company events for shippers, recruitment, training

label_categories.description: For shops, sellers, people sending goods through delivery service
label_categories.rules: Content from sellers posting/commenting. Indicators: mentions 'packing orders', 'sending goods', 'shipping to customers', 'packaging', 'confirming orders'. Complaints about delivery from sender perspective. Mentions sales, platform fees, order count, return rate, shipping fees (seller viewpoint). Mentions returned goods, used returned items. Keywords: 'my shop', 'we sell', 'give to delivery service', 'shop's order'

Content from buyers/receivers posting/commenting. Indicators: mentions 'ordering', 'receiving goods', 'opening package', 'unbox'. Complaints about delivery quality from receiver perspective. Mentions shopping experience, product reviews received. Keywords: 'I ordered', 'my order', 'waiting forever not delivered', 'received goods', 'delivered to'

label_categories.description: Remaining buzz that cannot be identified
label_categories.rules: Content that cannot be categorized into other labels

label_categories.description: Buzz from shops, sellers, people sending goods through delivery service
label_categories.rules:
Content related to sellers, shop owners, or people operating a store.
The author is speaking from the seller or shop perspective.

Indicators:
- Mentions activities related to running a shop: packing orders, shipping goods, packaging items, confirming orders, handing goods to delivery services.
- Discussions about shop operations: managing orders, sending packages, preparing shipments.
- Discussions about business metrics: sales revenue, number of orders, platform fees, taxes, return rates, shipping costs.
- Complaints about delivery or logistics from the sender/seller perspective.
- Mentions returned goods, damaged returns, or customers returning used items.

Typical keywords or phrases:
- "shop tôi", "shop mình", "bên mình bán"
- "đóng đơn", "đóng gói", "chốt đơn"
- "gửi hàng", "ship cho khách"
- "giao cho bên vận chuyển"
- "đơn hàng của shop"
- "doanh số", "phí sàn", "thuế", "số đơn"
- "tỷ lệ hoàn", "hàng bị hoàn"

Important:
- Content must reflect the perspective of someone selling or operating a shop.
- Affiliate promotion or sale hunting content should NOT be classified as SELLER.

label_categories.description: Buzz from buyers, receivers, including Brand Mentions like general news, KOL livestream selling/entertainment, affiliate posts
label_categories.rules:
Content from buyers, receivers, or general users discussing shopping activities on Shopee.
This also includes affiliate-related content and sale-hunting discussions.

Indicators:
- Mentions ordering products, waiting for delivery, receiving goods, opening packages, or reviewing products.
- Discussions about personal shopping experiences.
- Complaints about delivery from the receiver perspective.
- Comments asking for product links, prices, or purchase instructions.

Affiliate and promotion related content also belongs to BUYER:
- Posts or comments mentioning affiliate marketing, affiliate links, or commission-based promotion.
- Content sharing product links, asking for "link", or promoting products through affiliate programs.
- Discussions about hunting discounts, voucher codes, or sale campaigns.

Typical keywords or phrases:
- "mình đặt", "đơn của tôi", "đặt hàng"
- "nhận hàng", "chờ giao", "giao tới"
- "unbox", "mở hàng"
- "xin link", "link đâu", "mua ở đâu"
- "affiliate", "aff", "aff link"
- "săn sale", "săn mã", "mã giảm giá", "deal", "flash sale"

Important:
- Affiliate promotions, sale hunting, and discount discussions should be classified as BUYER even if the post promotes a product.

metadata.description: Label classification rules for social listening system covering ShopeeFood, Giao hàng nhanh (GHN), SPX Express, and Shopee projects
metadata.notes: This configuration defines label types, keywords, rules, and examples for automated and manual classification of social media content
